subcodes.first_line: O scion of Vakil! Render thanks that in this sacred Era and Age of the Ancient Beauty ye have set foot upon the carpet of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله وکیل حمد کنید که در عهد و عصر مقدس جمال قدم در بساط وجود قدم نهادید
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
